meaning: 1. did I ever ...? (or "did he ever ...?" etc)
english: When did I ever say I disagreed?

sentence: 她在晚会上唱了一首民谣。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎnhuì shang chàng le yī shǒu mínyáo.
english: She sang a folk song at the evening party.

sentence: 这幅画的色调非常温暖。
pinyin: Zhè fú huà de sèdiào fēicháng wēnnuǎn.
english: The hues of this painting are very warm.

sentence: 这个灯泡是二十瓦特的。
pinyin: Zhège dēngpào shì èrshí wǎtè de.
english: This light bulb is twenty watts.

meaning: 1. mold; 2. matrix; 3. pattern or die; 4. Taiwan pr. [mó jù]
sentence: 工厂订购了一批新模具。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng dìnggòu le yī pī xīn mújù.
english: The factory ordered a batch of new molds.
